spec_match.rationale: Spectacular compliance. Side-by-side comparison maps exactly to W3C spec differences (e.g. how border-image renders outside the border-radius clipping path, whereas border-area is a background-clip operation respecting border-radius natively).

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with input ranges for border radius and border width, dynamically updating the comparison boxes.

edge_cases.rationale: Very complete. Outlines per-side widths, outlines, shadows, and border-radius limitations brilliantly.

references.rationale: Includes correct MDN and sibling links.

design_system.rationale: Exceptional. Clean comparative tables, colorful scenario badge markers (ok/broken), and consistent styling.

summary: A gold standard comparative study demonstrating border-area versus border-image, highlighting spec boundaries (like border-radius support) in an interactive playground.
